title: フロンティア・スピリッツ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During an interview with Etsuko Otonashi, Taiki
Shuttle talks about her ambition to become
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to hide her shock, the reporter informs
Taiki that there has never been a single sprinter
selected for the title.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is up against an unprecedented
challenge... but sees it a trivial concern.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains her solution with vigor—if there's
never been a sprinter selected as Umamusume of
the Year, she'll just have to be the first!
